2606.27047.title: NuclearQAv2: A Structured Benchmark for Evaluating Domain-Science Competence in Large Language Models
2606.27047.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong performance across a wide range of tasks, but ensuring their reliability in highly technical domains remains a significant challenge. In nuclear engineering, problem solving often requires not only factual knowledge but also quantitative reasoning and conceptual understanding. To address the need for systematic evaluation in this domain, we introduce NuclearQAv2, a benchmark for assessing LLMs on nuclear engineering knowledge. The benchmark comprises approximately 1,240 question-answer pairs spanning three categories: boolean, numeric, and verbal. NuclearQAv2 is constructed using a hybrid pipeline that combines expert-authored questions, existing datasets, and LLM-assisted generation from domain-specific technical corpora. By leveraging structured prompting for both automated question generation and response evaluation, the proposed framework enables scalable benchmark construction and evaluation. We evaluate a diverse set of LLMs using NuclearQAv2 and observe substantial performance differences across task types. While the models generally perform well on factual questions, quantitative reasoning and conceptual understanding remain considerably more challenging. These results highlight the importance of multi-faceted evaluation frameworks and establish NuclearQAv2 as a scalable benchmark for assessing LLM capabilities in technical domains.
2606.27047.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）在各種任務中展現出強大的表現，但在高度技術領域確保其可靠性仍然是一個重大挑戰。<lb/>在核工程中，解決問題通常不僅需要事實知識，還需要定量推理和概念理解。<lb/>為了滿足該領域系統評估的需求，我們引入了NuclearQAv2，一個用於評估LLMs在核工程知識上的基準。<lb/>該基準包含約1,240對問題-答案對，涵蓋三個類別：布林、數值和口頭。<lb/>NuclearQAv2是使用混合流程構建的，該流程結合了專家撰寫的問題、現有數據集和來自特定領域技術語料庫的LLM輔助生成。<lb/>通過利用結構化提示進行自動問題生成和回應評估，所提出的框架實現了可擴展的基準構建和評估。<lb/>我們使用NuclearQAv2評估了一組多樣化的LLMs，並觀察到不同任務類型之間的顯著性能差異。<lb/>雖然這些模型在事實問題上通常表現良好，但定量推理和概念理解仍然相對更具挑戰性。<lb/>這些結果突顯了多面向評估框架的重要性，並確立了NuclearQAv2作為評估LLM在技術領域能力的可擴展基準。
2606.27047.author: Henry Shaowu Yuchi et.al.
2606.27047.authors: Henry Shaowu Yuchi, Michal Kucer, Benjamin H. Sims, Selma Peterson, Emily Taylor
